title: Connecting Google Apps Script Automations with Looker Studio Reports
summary: How I built a Google Workspace automation flow that archives installation records, organizes Drive files, writes audit logs, and prepares clean Google Sheets data for Looker Studio reporting.

sections.heading: Why I Built This Automation
content: The original process was manual: installation rows were managed inside Google Sheets, archive files had to be organized by month, and the workspace needed to be prepared again for the next working day.

Manual workflows like this create repeated work, risk of missed records, and poor visibility when something fails. My goal was to create a stable Google-native automation that could run every day with minimal maintenance.

sections.heading: Automation Architecture
content: The automation uses Google Apps Script as the execution layer, Google Sheets as the operational workspace, Google Drive as the archive storage layer, and Looker Studio as the reporting layer.
Google Apps Script handles the operational workflow, while Looker Studio handles dashboards, charts and summaries.

sections.heading: What the Script Does
list: Validates the workspace spreadsheet, sheet names, Drive folder and timezone.
Archives completed installation rows into the correct monthly archive file.
Creates year and month folders/files in Google Drive when needed.
Writes audit log entries for visibility and troubleshooting.
Resets the workspace and creates fresh rows for the next working day.
Sends email alerts only when errors occur.
